title.value: Monitor for changes in the CDC Covid Reporting Program

description.value: Changed to the CDC Covid Reporting Program
CDC Reporting Program Measure resource update

reason.value: ACME hospital to listen of changes tothe CDC Covid Reporting Program

description.value: Bed Capacity Measure that is reported on a daily cadence. Note- This Measure is identical to the BedCapacityMeasure-monthly Measure. FHIR IG tooling does not support multiple versions of the same canonical resource within a single IG, so their Measure/ids have been modified for this IG example purposes.

expression.value: All Beds Occupied Initial Population

description.value: Bed Capacity Measure that is reported on a monthly cadence. Note- This Measure is identical to the BedCapacityMeasure-daily Measure. FHIR IG tooling does not support multiple versions of the same canonical resource within a single IG, so their Measure/ids have been modified for this IG example purposes.
